creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
I personally do not believe that sendmail should ever be used, but from my experience using it in the past, this error is what you get when sendmail does not know that "fake-domain.com" is a domain that it is supposed to receive mail for as a final destination. (just being listed in an MX is not enough for this.)

Accordingly, it detects that the mail would loop, since the host listed as the MX is itself, and produces an error instead.

This is nothing to do with MX and NS being on the same system.
